title: July 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}
'''July 29''' is the 210th day (211th in leap years) of the year, with 155 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[David Warner]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[John Harris]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Timothy Omundson]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Sasha Frost]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[The Last Command 6|''The Last Command'' 6]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Princess Leia and the Royal Ransom]]'' published.
*2009 – [[Legacy (2006) 38|''Legacy'' (2006) 38]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Jedi Academy: Return of the Padawan]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 7|''Star Wars'' (2015) 7]] published.
*2015 – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' reprinted as part of the [[Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions]] series.
*[[2020]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 3|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 3]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge - Episode 9|''Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge'' - Episode 9]] premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids YouTube channel]].
*[[2025]] – ''[[The Acolyte: The Crystal Crown]]'' published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars: A New Hope'' (novel)]] reprinted.
*2025 – [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' (novel)]] reprinted.
*2025 – [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' (novel)]] reprinted.
